title: IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd:
IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd!
